title: TRANSITONAL HOUSING PROGRAM - 211info
text: ROSEBURG RESCUE MISSION MEN'S SHELTER TRANSITONAL HOUSING PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 40 room transitional housing program. Restrooms and showers are shared. Residents must attend a weekly chapel service. Rooms can be rented for an indefinite time. 526 SE Lane Avenue Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: -Men age 18 and older -Must pass a urinalysis for drug use -Agree to follow program rules -Participant in New Life Program or Emergency Men's Shelter program Hours: Office hours: Monday-Friday 9am-2:30pm Transitional housing curfew: 7 days per week 10pm Email (541) 673-3004 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 673-3004 Main phone Main phone (541) 673-3004 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to get on the waitlist. Priority is given to New Life Program participants. FEES: Varies per room; the average monthly cost is $260 DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Douglas County SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Services: Transitional Housing/Shelter * Homeless Men Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - ROSEBURG RESCUE MISSION MEN'S SHELTER INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - THE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
